name: Prelude Therapeutics Inc
business: Prelude Therapeutics is a precision oncology company that discovers and develops novel precision cancer medicines, including targeted protein degraders and other therapeutic modalities. It has not yet generated any product revenue and its pipeline includes programs in clinical and preclinical development targeting cancers with high unmet medical need.

exposures.sentence: Prelude is a precision oncology company built on a foundation of drug discovery excellence to deliver novel precision cancer medicines to underserved patients.
Our pipeline is designed to serve patients with high unmet medical need, where there are limited or no treatment options.

We believe we can best address these diseases by harnessing advances in new therapeutic modalities such as targeted protein degradation to develop highly potent and specific agents against clinically validated targets in areas of high unmet need.
We have discovered novel allosteric inhibitors that bind into the JAK2 JH2 deep pocket where the V617F mutation resides.
We have discovered and are developing a series of selective and orally bioavailable KAT6A selective degraders.
Drawing on our expertise in targeted protein degradation, we have discovered and optimized a series of proprietary degrader payloads for use in discovering and developing DACs.
We recently presented preclinical data supporting this hypothesis at the American Association for Cancer Research Annual Meeting 2025.

catalysts.sentence: The Phase 1 study of PRT12396 is an open-label, multi-center, safety and efficacy study in patients with high-risk polycythemia vera (PV) and intermediate and high-risk myelofibrosis (MF).
We have selected a development candidate and remain on track to file an IND in mid-2026.

catalysts.event: Complete remaining performance obligations for AbCellera collaboration
catalysts.sentence: We estimate the remaining performance obligations will be completed in the second half of 2026.
